pages.raw_text:
The people of Spokane have two opportunities of get
ting back at the corporations which stealing the va
able municipal rights


One is


To vote against Acuff the candidate of the Spokes-
man Review and the Washington Water Power company
The other


To vote for the charter amendment.


cannot be too strongly urged upon the taxpayers that
the of the charter amendment proposition
the defeat of the franchise grabbing corporations.


Regardless of party-regardless of candidaes-every
voter should support the proposed charter amendment
which provides for the submission of franchise to vote
of the people,


Do not believe the lying statements of the corporations
that they will be able to get franchises without paying the
city for them.


IF they could do so they would not be opposing the
amendment strongly.


To get franchises for nothing, for a nominal sum-
added to the expense of bribng cocmen is what the
vent that.


If, when the councmen put the franchise to vote
the do not tax proper to be paid to the city for the
same by the corporation asking for it
THE PEOPLE MAY DEFEAT IT-VOTE 1T DOWN
That is the power which is given to the people by the
charter amendment. 1t is power which, heretofore has
rested with councmen of the Lindsey Snyder sort


1T is A POWER WHO HAAS CORRUPTED MORE
COUNCILMEN THAN ANY OTHER AUTHORITY!


It is time the people taking that coruptng
bghtng power away from the weak and reserving it to
the strong


Vote for the charter amendment.


Vote for Daggett.


And


Do for the Spokesman Reviews stool pigeon
candidate, Henry L. Lilienthal.
